metadata.name: new one
metadata.author: me
metadata.description: A creeping corruption poisons the rivers and fields. Find the purification stones in the dungeons and cleanse the sacred fountain in Nettlemarch.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Nettlemarch
towns.description: A walled outpost on the frontier, always on guard against the wilds.

key_dungeons.name: Obsidian Labyrinth
key_dungeons.description: Thick vines choke the mouth of Obsidian Labyrinth. Beyond them, torchlight flickers in the gloom.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Brave the depths of Obsidian Labyrinth for the Amber Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Few who enter these halls return unchanged.
